$schema: Config layer classification for brain-qa and architecture audits
$description: Classifies .github/config/ files into core-brain vs integration-layer. See ARCHITECTURE-ASSUMPTIONS A2.2/A2.4.

core-brain.description: Pure brain state — no extension dependency. Used by muscles, hooks, and agents.

integration-layer.description: Brain configs consumed by the VS Code extension. Direction: Architecture → Extension (I8 compliant).

runtime-state.description: Transient session state written by hooks/muscles. Not distributed to heirs.
